error.generic: Login failed, please check that the username and password are correct

bootstrap.title: Complete initial setup
bootstrap.subtitle: Octopus needs an initial admin account before anyone can sign in.
bootstrap.description: Create the admin account on this page, then sign in immediately.
bootstrap.initialized: Initial setup is complete. You can sign in now.

notice.title: First start protection
notice.description: This instance will not create a default admin account automatically. Enter your own secure credentials during the first visit.

form.passwordHint: Password must be at least 12 characters long.

error.server: Setup status is temporarily unavailable. Check the backend logs and try again.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: A unified view for Octopus metrics, utilization, and route health. Phase one stays on top of existing stats and relay logs.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: A shared surface for requests, tokens, cost, and coverage metrics.

utilization.title: Utilization
utilization.description: Track capacity usage and distribution across channels, models, and keys.

routeHealth.title: Route Health
routeHealth.description: Summarize group availability, failure signals, and routing stability.

analytics.note: This phase only establishes the page shell and navigation. Real aggregates are added in the next step.

overview.description: Phase-one overview built from existing daily stats and replay data, focused on readable signals instead of new configuration.

utilization.description: Break down request usage across providers, models, and API keys for the selected range.
utilization.empty: No utilization data in the selected range

routeHealth.description: Combines current group membership state with failures from the last 24 hours, sorted to surface risky groups first.
routeHealth.empty: No route groups available for evaluation

evaluation.title: Evaluation
evaluation.description: Aggregate existing group testing and AI route analysis entry points, while keeping this release to live runtime summaries only and avoiding benchmark archival.

availability.title: Group Availability Checks
availability.description: The actual test action still runs from each group card; this page only provides the shared entry point and latest runtime summary.
availability.hint: {count} groups are currently available for testing.
availability.empty: There are no groups available to test right now.

aiRoute.title: AI Route Analysis
aiRoute.description: Reuse the existing AI Route trigger and progress flow, and surface the latest task state here.
aiRoute.unavailable: The latest AI route task is temporarily unavailable.
aiRoute.empty: There is no recent AI route task.

semanticCache.title: Semantic Cache Evaluation
semanticCache.description: Review the live semantic cache runtime and hit signals here, while keeping configuration in Settings.
semanticCache.hint: Use this entry to inspect runtime status first, then tune embedding and cache settings from the Settings page.
semanticCache.summaryDescription: This section shows the live runtime counters returned by the evaluation API without duplicating the control surface from Settings.
semanticCache.unavailable: Semantic cache summary is temporarily unavailable. The rest of Evaluation stays usable.

archive.title: History Archive
archive.description: This version intentionally leaves benchmark history unarchived; this is product scope, not a loading failure.
archive.hint: If long-term storage is needed later, the data model and write path should be designed separately.

summary.title: Latest Evaluation Runtime
summary.description: Only the latest AI Route and group test tasks from the current session are shown here. No persistent history is stored yet.
summary.unavailable: The latest task progress is temporarily unavailable.
summary.empty: There is no runtime task to show right now.

ops.title: Ops
ops.subtitle: An operational view for cache, quota, health, and system summaries with the same density as the existing admin UI.

cache.description: Review semantic-cache configuration, runtime hit signals, and capacity usage in one place.

status.runtimeHint: The semantic cache is initialized and the metrics reflect the live runtime state.
status.runtimeMissing: The cache is disabled or the runtime was not initialized. Check semantic-cache settings.

quota.description: Aggregate API key caps, current spend, and anomaly signals without duplicating the full edit surface.
quota.empty: No API key quota summary is available.

health.description: Track database, cache, task configuration, and risky route groups in a single operational summary.

detail.noIssues: No high-priority risky groups at the moment.

system.description: Summarize version, key settings, and AI-route service-pool state in a read-only operations view.

fields.notConfigured: No AI-route service is configured right now.

audit.description: Track the management write operations that actually change system state, so it is clear who changed what and when.

detail.notFound: This audit record was not found.

user.title: User Management
user.confirmDelete: Delete this user? This cannot be undone.

create.title: Create User
create.passwordHint: Password must be at least 12 characters long.

rules.title: Alert Rules
rules.confirmDelete: Delete this rule? This cannot be undone.

channels.title: Notification Channels
channels.confirmDelete: Delete this notification channel? This cannot be undone.

errorState.title: Failed to load
errorState.message: Something went wrong while fetching data.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.message: An unexpected error occurred. We've logged it and are working on a fix.

globalErrorBoundary.title: Critical Error
globalErrorBoundary.message: The application encountered a critical error and cannot recover automatically.

activity.title: Activity Heatmap
activity.description: Track request activity across the past year and quickly spot active windows or long quiet periods.

overview.title: Usage Overview
overview.description: Track call volume, success rate, spend, and coverage for the selected range.
overview.empty: No overview data is available for this range

publicApiBaseUrl.label: Public API Base URL
publicApiBaseUrl.hint: Used to generate curl examples and onboarding links. Leave empty to hide these helpers.

circuitBreaker.title: Circuit Breaker
circuitBreaker.hint: When a channel fails consecutively up to the threshold, circuit breaker trips. Cooldown grows exponentially up to the max cooldown

ratelimitCooldown.label: 429 cooldown (seconds)
ratelimitCooldown.hint: After an upstream rate limit response, the channel is skipped for this cooldown period.

maxTotalAttempts.label: Max total attempts
maxTotalAttempts.hint: Limits total forwarded attempts across all candidate channels for one request. 0 means unlimited.

autoStrategy.title: Auto Strategy
autoStrategy.hint: Configure the automatic channel selection strategy. Channels with insufficient samples are explored first, then selection is based on success rate.

minSamples.label: Min Samples
minSamples.hint: Minimum requests before using success rate for selection

timeWindow.label: Time Window (sec)
timeWindow.hint: Time window for calculating success rate

sampleThreshold.label: Sample Threshold
sampleThreshold.hint: Maximum number of samples to keep in sliding window

latencyWeight.label: Latency Weight (0-100)
latencyWeight.hint: Higher values prefer lower-latency channels more strongly; lower values lean more on success rate.

group.label: Default Target Group for Single-Group AI Routing
group.hint: Used by the compatibility single-group AI routing flow. Clicking “AI Route” on the route page generates the full routing table directly.

model.label: AI Model
model.placeholder: Enter the model used for route analysis

timeoutSeconds.label: AI Timeout (seconds)
timeoutSeconds.hint: Applies to a single AI route analysis request. Increase it if the model is slow or the model list is large.

parallelism.label: Batch Parallelism
parallelism.hint: Controls the maximum number of AI route buckets analyzed in parallel. Defaults to 3, allows higher values, and never exceeds the number of batches in the current task.

services.label: AI Service Pool (JSON)
services.placeholder: Enter a JSON array of AI services
services.hint: Leave empty or [] to keep using the single-service settings above. A JSON array enables multi-service pooling and failover.
services.invalid: AI service pool JSON must be an array

semanticCache.title: Semantic Cache
semanticCache.description: Configure the semantic cache runtime and its dedicated embedding service without leaving the current card layout.

ttl.label: Cache TTL (seconds)
ttl.hint: Cached entries expire after this duration.

threshold.label: Similarity Threshold (0-100)
threshold.hint: Higher values require a closer semantic match before a cached response is reused.

maxEntries.label: Max Entries
maxEntries.placeholder: Enter the maximum number of cached entries
maxEntries.hint: When the limit is reached, older cached entries are evicted first.

embedding.title: Embedding Service
embedding.description: These settings are used only for semantic-cache embedding requests and are not shared with AI Route.

baseUrl.label: Embedding Base URL
baseUrl.placeholder: Enter an OpenAI-compatible embedding base URL

timeoutSeconds.label: Embedding Timeout (seconds)
timeoutSeconds.hint: Applies only to semantic-cache embedding requests.

pageOrder.title: Page Order
pageOrder.description: Drag the top-level pages into the order you want. Changes are saved globally as soon as the drop completes.
pageOrder.hint: This setting controls only the stored page order. The actual navbar integration is handled separately.

import.title: Import (Incremental)
import.noFile: Please select a JSON file first

routeGroups.title: Route Groups
routeGroups.description: Delete all route groups and all route items at once. This action cannot be undone.
routeGroups.count: {count, plural, =0 {No route groups} one {# route group} other {# route groups}}
routeGroups.confirmDescription:
This will permanently delete {count, plural, =0 {all route groups} one {# route group} other {# route groups}} and all route items.
The default target group for single-group AI routing will also be reset.
This action cannot be undone.
Continue?

password.label: Change Password
password.tooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

info.title: Version Info
info.versionMismatchHint: Frontend version ({frontend}) does not match backend version ({backend}). This may be a browser cache issue. Please force refresh the page.
info.newVersionAvailableHint: Please backup your data first, then update the system
info.updateSuccess: Update successful, service will restart shortly

navOrder.title: Page Order & Visibility
navOrder.description: Drag to reorder navigation pages and hide non-critical pages. The Settings page always stays visible.
navOrder.minimumVisibleHint: Keep at least {count} pages visible. The Settings page cannot be hidden.
navOrder.minimumVisibleError: At least {count} pages must remain visible

toast.autoGroupSuccess: Auto grouping completed: created {created} groups and skipped {skipped} existing groups
toast.autoGroupSuccessDescription: Scanned {models} models, identified {candidates} candidate groups, created {created}, skipped {skippedExisting} existing groups, and skipped {skippedCovered} covered models
toast.aiRouteTableSuccess: AI routing completed: generated {routes} routes, affected {groups} groups, and wrote {items} route items
toast.aiRouteGroupSuccess: AI group sync completed: generated {routes} routes and updated {items} route items in the current group
toast.aiRouteMissingGroup: Please select the default target group for single-group AI routing in settings first
toast.testAllPassed: All models in this group are available
toast.testPartialFailedDescription: You may want to remove the failed models

autoGroup.confirmDescription:
This will scan all channel models and create groups for uncovered models based on normalization rules.
Existing groups will not be modified or deleted.
Continue?

table.confirmTitle: Generate the Full AI Routing Table?
table.confirmDescription:
This will send all models to the AI for analysis and generate the full routing table in batch.
Existing groups with the same name will have their route items synchronized, and stale route items will be removed; other groups will not be deleted.
Continue?

group.confirmTitle: Sync the Current Group with AI Routing?
group.confirmDescription:
This will send all models to the AI for analysis and synchronize the current group's route items with the result.
Stale route items will be removed, and existing matches will be updated to the latest priority and weight.
Continue?

progress.title: AI Route Task Progress

description.table: The full AI routing table is being generated. You can close this dialog and come back later.
description.group: The current group's AI routes are being synchronized. You can close this dialog and come back later.

progress.heartbeatStale: Backend heartbeat is temporarily stale. It may still be waiting for the AI response.

result.groupSummary: AI group sync finished with {routes} routes and {items} route items updated.
result.tableSummary: AI routing table generation finished with {routes} routes, {groups} affected groups, and {items} route items written.

runtime.taskCreated: AI route task created and waiting to start.
runtime.taskTimeout: AI route task timed out. Please try again later.
runtime.plannedSingleBatch: Batch planning completed. Ready to start AI analysis.
runtime.waitingBatchResult: Waiting for AI result for batch {index}/{total} ({endpoint}, {channels} channels / {models} models).
runtime.parallelAnalyzing: Analyzing {active} batches in parallel. Latest started batch {index}/{total} ({endpoint}, {channels} channels / {models} models).
runtime.batchRetrying: Batch {index}/{total} failed. Switching to another service and retrying.
runtime.batchRetryingWithReason: Batch {index}/{total} failed. Switching to another service and retrying: {reason}
runtime.batchParsing: AI returned results for batch {index}/{total}. Parsing and validating.
runtime.batchCompletedWaitingNext: Batch {index}/{total} completed. Waiting to start the next batch.
runtime.allBatchesCompleted: All batches completed. Preparing to validate routes.
runtime.validatingRoutes: Validating {routes} candidate routes returned by AI.
runtime.validatingRoutesGeneric: Validating candidate routes returned by AI.
runtime.partialFailure: AI routing partially failed, but preserved {success_groups} successfully written groups: {cause}

card.testFailedTitle: The following models failed 3 consecutive checks and can be removed
card.testRemovableHint: You can edit this group and remove the models above.

form.name: Group Name
form.matchRegexPlaceholder: Leave empty to use default fuzzy match by group name
form.firstTokenTimeOutHint: Unit: seconds, only effective for streaming response, 0 = no limit
form.sessionKeepTimeHint: Unit: seconds, keeps using the same channel within a session, 0 = disabled

condition.label: Condition (JSON)
condition.hint: JSON array of rules. Leave empty to always match.

group.empty: No groups yet, click the button above to create one

emptyState.title: No groups yet
emptyState.description: You can create a group manually or use auto grouping / AI routing to generate them quickly.

summary.title: Model Market
summary.description: View model pricing, channel coverage, available keys, and runtime performance in one place while keeping the existing pricing workflow.

detail.noChannels: No channels cover this model yet

ccSwitch.description: Generate a CC Switch import deep link from the current channel configuration.
ccSwitch.missingPublicApiBaseUrl: Please set Public API Base URL in system settings first.
ccSwitch.missingKey: Please configure at least one enabled API key for this channel.

form.name: Channel Name
form.channelProxyPlaceholder: Optional: proxy for this channel (overrides global proxy)
form.paramOverridePlaceholder: Optional: JSON string to override request params
form.requestRewriteHint: Optional compatibility rewrite for stricter upstream request formats

template.label: Built-in Templates
template.hint: One click to prefill common provider settings

test.hint: Batch tests all entered endpoint and key combinations. HTTP 200 and 429 are treated as pass.

form.matchRegexPlaceholder: Optional: regex pattern to match request model names

errors.databaseSchemaOutdatedRestart: Database schema is outdated; restart the service to apply the latest migrations
